title: Colorful
description: Use Kyori MiniMessages in the MOTD and in the Tablist
body:
# Colorful
With Colorful you can use [Kyori MiniMessages](https://docs.advntr.dev/minimessage/index.html) in your Tablist or MOTD.

## How to use
Just install this plugin and edit the `plugins/colorful/config.json` file.

## Credits
Thank's to [KSpigot](https://github.com/jakobkmar/KSpigot) for the nice Kyori implementation
